summarization.a: The figure displays Raman spectra of as-deposited and annealed (in bold) iron oxide films, undoped,  grown at 425 °C.
summarization.b: The figure shows Raman spectra of as-deposited and annealed (in bold) iron oxide films, with 2:100 doping of MgO, grown at 425 °C.
summarization.c: The figure presents Raman spectra of as deposited iron oxide films, with 5:100 doping of MgO, grown at 425 °C (top line) and 375 °C (bottom line).

a.question: Which Raman bands (in cm^-1) are characteristic of the hematite (alpha-Fe2O3) phase?
Which phase was detected by Raman spectroscopy but not clearly by GIXRD?

b.question: What was the Mg:Fe ratio in the middle panel?
What Raman feature may suggest the presence of magnesioferrite in the films?
b.answer: A shoulder at approximately 700 cm^-1 next to the main 668 cm^-1 magnetite band (middle panel).
